title: Tobaru
summary: Mount Tobaru or Mount Lolodai is located in the northern part of Halmahera island, west of Dukono volcano. Little is known about this volcano because of its remote location.
text: Mount Tobaru or Mount Lolodai is located in the northern part of Halmahera island, west of Dukono volcano. Little is known about this volcano because of its remote location.
